note: As-built (report ⑤): the shipped board render flow (1b + 1c) plus the FR-10 number-key gate-answer interaction. The as-built matches the plan's intended design, with the D2 rendering split made concrete — the compact FR-4 dots ①②③④⑤ render on every board card, and the FR-9 segmented bar renders on the roomy needs-you strip gate rows ('bars where space allows'). Both call the one shared phaseProgress(f) [5]phaseState vector. The plan-time as-is baseline is in report/before/flow.mmd.

diagrams.title: As-built board render flow (1b pills/dots/┃-stripe/collapsed-changelog/footer + 1c needs-you strip/bars/number-keys)
FR-10 number-key gate answering: key → gates() → jumpToGate (focus + quickView read plan/report)
